runs.note: Implemented secure refresh token rotation with replay attack detection. Key changes: 1) New refresh tokens are generated and returned on each refresh, 2) Old tokens are marked as used and become invalid, 3) Replay attacks (reusing old tokens) trigger family revocation, 4) Added 30-day refresh token expiration, 5) Reduced access token lifetime to 15 minutes, 6) Added comprehensive audit logging for security monitoring.
